prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base landscape, remove all YAMAP branding, date, route, and metric overlay text, then transform the scene into a polished anime-style travel illustration while preserving the mountaintop viewpoint over the city, lake, distant mountains, hazy sky, and green forested foreground. Add one foreground character: a young anime hiker viewed from behind/three-quarter back, standing on an old stone castle-wall lookout and gazing over the scenery. Give the character long aqua-blue hair in a high ponytail with a blue ribbon and star hair ornament, a light blue hiking shirt, beige cargo hiking pants, brown hiking boots, fingerless gloves, and a large dark hiking backpack. Add exactly 4 visible gear/accessory elements on or near the character: 1 rolled sleeping mat strapped to the backpack, 1 dangling blue star charm, 1 small blue bird-like companion perched near the shoulder, and 1 small hiking pouch/strap detail. Add weathered stone blocks under the character and soft blurred green leaves in the lower foreground for depth. Keep the composition scenic and peaceful, with bright morning light, gentle atmospheric haze, crisp anime linework on the character, and a softly detailed semi-realistic background. Do not include any text, logos, UI, or watermark.
